name: minecraft-codex-skills
description: A dual-target Minecraft Java and Bedrock development skills bundle for Codex and Claude Code, with built-in image-generation workflows on Codex.

interface.shortDescription: 18 reusable Minecraft Java and Bedrock development and operations skills, plus built-in image-generation workflows on Codex.
interface.longDescription: Bundle modding, plugin-dev, datapack, commands, testing, CI/CD, world generation, resource pack, Java-to-Bedrock pack conversion, Java and Bedrock server admin, permissions, crossplay, WorldEdit ops, and EssentialsX ops skills in one installable package, with built-in image-generation workflows when running on Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Minecraft Codex Skills to scaffold a NeoForge 1.21.11 mod with data generation.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to plan Bedrock Dedicated Server access, pack deployment, and backup operations.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to convert a Java resource pack into a Bedrock .mcpack with a conversion report.
Use Minecraft Codex Skills to generate pack art or concept textures for a resource-pack update.
